name: Influence of rapamycin on safety and healthspan metrics after one year: PEARL trial results
summary: Peer-reviewed 2025 Aging report of the 48-week decentralized randomized placebo-controlled PEARL trial of weekly 5 mg or 10 mg rapamycin in healthy normative-aging adults, reporting similar adverse-event rates across groups, no significant visceral-adiposity change, and selected secondary/subgroup healthspan signals.
